title: Doughy, Crispy Kenyan Knead Roti
description: A delicious, crispy Kenyan dish featuring the perfect balance of doughy texture and a hint of sweetness from peach juice.
instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine flour, sugar, and salt.
Gradually add the warm milk, yeast, ghee, and water to the dry ingredients.
Mix until a smooth dough forms.
Knead the dough on a floured surface for about 5 minutes.
Place the dough in a greased bowl, cover it with a damp cloth, and let it rise in a warm place for about an hour.
Heat a kadhai over medium heat.
Divide the dough into 6-8 equal portions and roll each portion into a ball.
Roll out each ball into a thin circle.
Brush the rotis with vegetable oil and cook for about 1-2 minutes on each side, or until they are golden brown and crispy.
Brush the rotis with melted ghee and sprinkle with sesame seeds.
Serve the rotis hot with your favorite Kenyan dish.
